All Classes|All Packages

P

Product - Class in com.shoppingcart
Product class that handles the representation of products in program Is serializable and cloneable
Product(String, String, String, double, double, int, int) - Constructor for class com.shoppingcart.Product
Default constructor for products which requires input of following parameters
ProductFrame - Class in com.shoppingcart
class that handles the product frame
ProductFrame(ProductModel, String, PurchaseModel) - Constructor for class com.shoppingcart.ProductFrame
general constructor to make new instance of the product frame
ProductModel - Class in com.shoppingcart
Class to handle the product model (product data)
ProductModel() - Constructor for class com.shoppingcart.ProductModel
default constructor which sets up products
productsPage - Variable in class com.shoppingcart.ProductFrame
 
Purchase - Class in com.shoppingcart
Purchase class that handles the representation of a purchase
Purchase(String, double, HashMap<Product, Integer>) - Constructor for class com.shoppingcart.Purchase
default constructor which creates a new purchase
PurchaseModel - Class in com.shoppingcart
class that handles purchase model
PurchaseModel() - Constructor for class com.shoppingcart.PurchaseModel
constructor that reads in purchases
purchasePage - Variable in class com.shoppingcart.ProductFrame
